label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So, there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a present of a different color. Initially, their presents are: - Alice: pink ball - Bob: brown present - Claire: green present - Dave: red present - Eve: purple present Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me track each swap and see who ends up with which present. First swap: Claire and Bob swap their gifts. So, after this first swap: - Claire now has Bob's brown present - Bob now has Claire's original green present - The others remain the same: - Alice: pink - Dave: red - Eve: purple Second swap: Claire and Dave swap their gifts. Now: - Claire had the brown present
